title: METADAP genetic protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2oj1c","text":"Genomic DNA was extracted from circulating blood leucocytes by using Gentra Puregene Blood Kits according to the manufacturer’s protocol (Qiagen) and was stored at -20°C. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"align-justify","offset":0,"length":171}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"59do","text":"The TRKB polymorphismswere genotyped by the IntegraGen company (Evry, France) using the Fluidigm®BioMarkTMHD system (Fluidigm Corporation, CA, USA), using TaqMan allelic discrimination (Coulbault et al., 2006), with the ABI Prism® 7900HT Sequence Detection Sys­tem (Life Technologies).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Eric Deflesselle
